grants.comment: claude-runner coder sessions: read-only estate visibility (resource state + runtime logs) — the agent debugs deployed apps but cannot change Azure outside GitHub Actions.

claude-coder broker: open Arc cluster-connect tunnels to the shared homelab k3s cluster (claude-k8s-preview lives in rg-claude-runner-preview — cross-RG, so the coder repo's SP cannot self-assign this). Data-plane auth stays a least-priv in-cluster SA token; this role only permits listClusterUserCredential for the proxy.
roles: Azure Arc Enabled Kubernetes Cluster User Role

grants.comment: claude-coder sessions: read-only estate visibility (resource state + runtime logs), matching the claude-runner coder profile — the agent debugs deployed apps but cannot change Azure outside GitHub Actions. Same identity on both backends (IMDS on ACI, workload-identity federation on the homelab cluster).

claude-coder broker: read the estate's single GitHub App private key from the shared vault (rg-claude-runner) to mint installation tokens for coder-portal sessions — instead of copying the PEM into a second vault. Read-only (Secrets User).

claude-coder coder profile: read/write on the estate's coder vault (kv-coder) — the same $PROFILE_KEYVAULT the claude-runner coder profile uses, so both platforms share one per-profile secret store. Cross-RG, so the coder repo's SP cannot self-assign this.
claude-coder cloud-sysadmin profile: read/write on the estate's cloud-sysadmin vault. Ask-first profile; the vault is its only writable secret store.

claude-coder local-sysadmin profile: read/write on the estate's local-sysadmin vault (ha-api-token, unifi-api-key live here). Homelab-only profile; staged until the per-profile k8s namespaces exist, but the grant is safe to land with the identity.

claude-coder personal assistant profile: read/write on the estate's personal vault (banking/API credentials seeded by Kenneth). Same one-vault-per-profile boundary as claude-runner's personal profile.

claude-coder business assistant profile: read/write on the estate's business vault. Deliberately NO shared-vault read and NO GitHub token access (enforced broker-side in claude-coder); Graph Mail.Read is a separate decision for Kenneth (graph-grants.json), not included here.

agent broker (claude-coder's successor platform, Kenneth's ask 2026-07-15): open Arc cluster-connect tunnels to the shared homelab k3s cluster — mirrors the id-claude-coder grant above. The claude-coder entries stay until rg-claude-coder is decommissioned after the parallel-run period.
roles: Azure Arc Enabled Kubernetes Cluster User Role

grants.comment: agent broker: read the estate's single GitHub App private key from the shared vault (rg-claude-runner) to mint installation tokens for sessions — mirrors the id-claude-coder grant. Read-only (Secrets User).

agent sessions (coder profile): read-only estate visibility (resource state + runtime logs), matching the claude-runner and claude-coder coder profiles. Same identity on both backends (IMDS on ACI, workload-identity federation on the homelab cluster).
agent coder profile: read/write on the estate's shared coder vault (kv-coder) — the same $PROFILE_KEYVAULT the claude-runner and claude-coder coder profiles use.
agent cloud-sysadmin profile: read/write on the estate's cloud-sysadmin vault — mirrors the claude-coder syscloud grant.

agent local-sysadmin profile: read/write on the estate's local-sysadmin vault (ha-api-token, unifi-api-key) — mirrors the claude-coder localsys grant; staged until the agent-profile-* k8s namespaces exist, safe to land with the identity.
agent personal assistant profile: read/write on the estate's personal vault — mirrors the claude-coder personal grant.

agent business assistant profile: read/write on the estate's business vault — mirrors the claude-coder business grant (deliberately NO shared-vault read and NO GitHub token access; Graph Mail.Read lives in graph-grants.json).

TEMPORARY (claude-coder → agent state migration, 2026-07-15): let the coder session identity read the old platform's storage account key so it can copy Table Storage (sessions/routines/transcripts) + Files shares (codex-home/claude-home logins) into rg-agent's account. REMOVE this entry (and the live assignment) once the migration is verified — tracked in the agent cutover plan.
roles: Storage Account Key Operator Service Role

grants.comment: TEMPORARY (claude-coder → agent state migration, 2026-07-15): the WRITE side of the one-time copy — key access on the NEW platform's storage account (rg-agent), pairing the read-side grant above. REMOVE both entries (and the live assignments) once the migration is verified — tracked in the agent cutover plan.
roles: Storage Account Key Operator Service Role
